name: Robin LEDBeam 200

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: FB5A948A-5B94-4DF4-BDAC-FA7A96C80A77

comment:
Robin LEDBeam 200™: Do you love the fast setup and easy transport of the LEDBeam™ family - but want more punch, higher brightness, and richer colour? The super fast LEDBeam 200 builds on everything that made the series so popular, introducing a significantly more powerful LED engine without sacrificing speed or portability.
Featuring Robe’s advanced optical design and 7 × 55 W RGBLime multichip LEDs

capabilities.comment: RoboSpot disabled except handle faders and PT
Ranbow effect (with fade time) from slow to fast
Ranbow effect (without fade time) from slow to fast
Movement Fast to Slow- Left to Right
Movement Slow to Fast - Right to Left

gwSpecs.description:
Do you love the fast setup and easy transport of the LEDBeam™ family - but want more punch, higher brightness, and richer colour? The super fast LEDBeam 200 builds on everything that made the series so popular, introducing a significantly more powerful LED engine without sacrificing speed or portability.
Featuring Robe’s advanced optical design and 7 × 55 W RGBLime multichip LEDs
